title: plan.contract.proposed.v1 payload
description: Payload of the plan.contract.proposed.v1 event — notification that a ChangePlan (Action Contract) has been proposed and is awaiting approval. References the ChangePlan instance by uri+hash; does not carry the plan body itself.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: approved plan §2 event row (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5 'event/ 6종', deliverable 3); docs/specs/SAENA_k3s_Package_and_Operations_Spec_v1.md §4.2:189-199 ActionContractProposed message skeleton (base_commit:193/contract_uri:194/contract_hash:195/evidence_ids:196/patch_unit_ids:197 — contract_hash reference pattern also mirrors domain/change-plan.contract_hash self-reference-avoidance design and domain/approval-decision.contract_hash carrier pattern). contract_uri/contract_hash/base_commit shapes mirror the equivalent common/identifiers $defs used by domain/change-plan (repo_commit -> git_sha) and domain/source-snapshot/patch-artifact (uri_ref, sha256_ref) conventions. evidence_ids/patch_unit_ids mirror domain/change-plan.hypotheses[].evidence_ids and domain/change-plan.patch_units[].id array shapes (free-string arrays, minItems 1 when present) and correspond to ActionContractProposed.evidence_ids:196/.patch_unit_ids:197. evidence_ledger_hash mirrors domain/change-plan.evidence_ledger_hash (H-3, security-model.md) — not itself a k3s §4.2 ActionContractProposed field, an H-3 addition beyond the proto skeleton. NO additionalProperties:false (open class).

contract_uri.$comment: k3s §4.2:194 ActionContractProposed.contract_uri. Reference to the proposed ChangePlan instance (object storage) — never inline plan content in the event payload, same reference-only convention as artifact_uri/snapshot_uri. uri_ref forbids query/fragment (ADR-0024(f)).

contract_hash.$comment: k3s §4.2:195 ActionContractProposed.contract_hash. Integrity anchor for the referenced ChangePlan instance — same carrier role as domain/approval-decision.contract_hash and domain/patch-artifact.contract_hash (ChangePlan itself omits its own hash by design, self-reference avoidance).

base_commit.$comment: k3s §4.2:193 ActionContractProposed.base_commit. The immutable repo commit the plan is proposed against — mirrors domain/change-plan.repo_commit / domain/patch-artifact.base_commit (git_sha, 40-hex).

evidence_ids.$comment: k3s §4.2:196 ActionContractProposed.evidence_ids. Mirrors domain/change-plan.hypotheses[].evidence_ids shape — Algorithm §5.3 Proof-Carrying Change Set claim<->evidence linkage, payload-level roll-up across the proposed plan's hypotheses.

patch_unit_ids.$comment: k3s §4.2:197 ActionContractProposed.patch_unit_ids. Mirrors domain/change-plan.patch_units[].id shape — patch unit identifiers included in the proposed plan.

evidence_ledger_hash.$comment: Mirrors domain/change-plan.evidence_ledger_hash (H-3, security-model.md '근거 고정') — anchors the evidence set snapshot referenced by evidence_ids at proposal time.
